name: dingtalk-to-ai-skill
description: 通过钉钉群聊远程控制本地 AI CLI（OpenCode 或 Claude Code），在手机上随时随地与 AI 编码助手交互
author: dreamor

skills.name: Dingtalk Bridge
skills.description: Manage the Dingtalk to AI CLI bridge (OpenCode or Claude Code). Use for: setting up, starting, stopping, or diagnosing the bridge; forwarding messages from Dingtalk group chat to OpenCode or Claude Code CLI.
